content.en:
Cloudless, core area.

Ye Tian entered here again, and his strength improved a lot, although he still couldn't compete with so many Quadruple Origin Ancestor Black Cloud Beasts, he could easily steal resources and then run away.

These Black Cloud Beasts couldn't kill him at all.

"I brought another batch of resources out, and if I take my time like this, I should be able to raise the Extreme Dao Will to a level that is enough to condense the three hundred and sixty-five layers of the Will Pagoda. Ye Tian said darkly.

In the following years, Ye Tian stole resources from the Cloudless Frontier again and again, and continuously improved the will of the Extreme Dao.

Finally, after a long time, Ye Tian completely condensed the three hundred and sixty-five layers of Will Pagoda.

"I can't condense anymore!"

Ye Tianming enlightened.

This is a feeling, even if he inscribes all the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extremes on the Will Pagoda, he will no longer be able to make the Will Pagoda break the boundaries and condense another layer of the Will Pagoda.

The 365-story Pagoda of Will is the limit!

"Sure enough, this is the real limit, there is no way to make a few hundred layers of will pagoda, and there is no point in comprehending more extreme extreme paths, after all, there is no limit to the number of extreme extreme paths in the strict sense, there is no need to comprehend too many extreme extreme paths, three hundred and sixty-five kinds of extreme extreme paths are already the real limits in fact, even if I can only comprehend so many extreme extreme paths!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Although he comprehended thousands of extreme paths, the others were only consummated.

Of course, the most important and core Extreme Dao is still the Endless Pole Dao, and his Endless Extreme Dao is about to reach the level of the Extreme Extreme Dao.

"I have a feeling that when I comprehend the three hundred and sixty-four extreme extreme paths, the endless extreme path will be complete, and when the time comes, the endless extreme path will be engraved on the last layer of the will pagoda as the last extreme path!" Ye Tian decided.

Time flies, and another period of time passes.

On this day, Ye Tian created a primordial control technique involving one hundred and eight extreme extremes, the Taichu Fist, and the power of this punch was second only to the Holy Technique Leaving the Dust and Golden Light.

In other words, when Ye Tian broke through to the Quadruple Ancestor, the power of this punch might be equivalent to the golden light from the dust.

If he had created a primordial mastery technique involving three hundred and sixty-five extreme paths, it would definitely be far beyond ordinary holy arts.

This moment.

Ye Tian found that the holy arts didn't seem to be a big deal, maybe only the top-notch holy arts were useful to him, and the ordinary holy arts didn't mean much to him!

"However, there is only one Triple Origin Ancestor like me in the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, and the other Triple Origin Ancestors and Quadruple Origin Ancestors are still extremely eager for a holy art!

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

this day.

"Sunset Mountain doesn't need to be guarded?"

Ye Tian suddenly received this information.

But soon, he knew why.

In the continuous battles, the Voidless Heavenly Gate and the Primordial Black Beasts of the Nine Dust Domain continued to fight, resulting in the death of a large number of Triple Origin Ancestors of the Voidless Heavenly Gate, and many of the Triple Ancestors were reluctant to go to Sunset Mountain.

In the end, the Void Heavenly Gate decided to hand over the Sunset Mountain to the Void Tooth Holy Gate to manage, which was equivalent to giving up the share of the Sunset Orb, which was also a great loss for the Void Heavenly Gate.

After all, although the Voidless Heavenly Gate is a subsidiary of the Void Tooth Holy Gate, it is only a nominal attachment, and there is no difference between the other and normal forces, and they also need to compete for resources by themselves.

Sunset Mountain is also one of the most important industries of the Voidless Heavenly Gate, and more than one of the Quadruple Ancestors needs the Sunset Orb and uses the Sunset Orb to exchange for other Orbs used to cultivate the Nine Yang Sword Light.

They didn't want to give up, but now they really can't hold on.

Subsequently, Sunset Mountain was accepted by the Void Tooth Holy Gate, and it had nothing to do with the Void Heavenly Gate.

Nine Dust Domains.

"Damn, the Voidless Heavenly Gate actually gave Sunset Mountain to the Void Tooth Holy Gate!" "The Nine Dust Ancestor was furious.

According to his plan, once the Voidless Heavenly Gate could not hold on, he would completely occupy the Sunset Mountain, and then slowly transform the Sunset Mountain, and then let the Dawn Holy Ancestor send the Triple Origin Ancestor who was good at magic circles to enter the Sunset Mountain, and arrange the magic circles one after another, so that the Voidless Heavenly Gate could not recapture the Sunset Mountain.

But now, it can't be done.

Airplanes!

The original ancestor of the ghost gate is here.

"Nine Dust Ancestor, give up the plan to attack Sunset Mountain, and I'll notify you when there is a task in the future!" said the Ghost Gate Ancestor.

"So you gave up?" The Nine Dust Ancestor was shocked, he thought that the Ghost Gate Ancestor would make it difficult for him!

"Of course give up!" "Ghost Gate Ancestor sneered, "Do you think you can really occupy Sunset Mountain, even if you do, how many years will it take to get a Sunset Orb? As for other resources, you are not qualified to let the Dawn Saint Ancestor care, do you think the Dawn Ancestor will really give you orders again and again for a few Sunset Orbs?"

The Nine Dust Ancestor's face changed, "Ghost Gate Ancestor, you mean that the goal of the Dawn Saint Ancestor has never been Sunset Mountain!"

"Of course not!" the Ghost Gate Ancestor sneered, "Sunset Mountain is also valuable, it is very precious to the Fourfold Heavenly Gate, but it is not of much value to the Fivefold Ancestor. The purpose of the Dawn Holy Ancestor is just for you to involve the Triple Ancestor of the Voidless Heavenly Gate, and let a large number of Triple Origin Ancestors enter the Sunset Mountain Battlefield. In this way, the Triple Ancestor in another place must not have many people to guard it. And not long ago, the Dawn Holy Ancestor succeeded, sending a group of Triple Origin Ancestors to directly seize an item. Thus, your mission is over. "

"I see!"

Nine Dust Ancestor nodded.

Subsequently, the original ancestor of the ghost gate left.

At this time, the aura of the Nine Dust Origin Ancestor's anger permeated the entire palace.

"Damn, Dawn Holy Ancestor, you're using me and hiding your true plans!"

The Nine Dust Origin Ancestor felt that he had no status at all, and he was also a half-step five-fold Origin Ancestor!

......

Nine Lights Holy Gate.

The original ancestor of the Ghost Gate has returned.

He stood in front of a young man, bowing humblely, where could he still face the domineering spirit of the Nine Dust Ancestors!

"Lord Dawn Holy Ancestor, I have already instructed Jiuchen not to continue attacking Sunset Mountain!"

"Well, that's good!" Dawn Ancestor said slightly: "Now that Sunset Mountain has been taken over by the Void Tooth Holy Gate, if I continue to attack, the Void Tooth Holy Gate is really likely to find the Nine Dust Domain, then I will be exposed." "

"Lord Dawn Holy Ancestor, if we use Jiuchen like this, he will definitely be dissatisfied, maybe he will still scold us in his heart, do you really want to keep him? He is a primordial black beast, and he doesn't deal with our cultivators, what if he breaks through to the fivefold ancestor?" said the Ghost Gate Ancestor worriedly.

"Jiuchen? Just because he also wants to become a Fivefold Ancestor, it's not that simple to become a Fivefold Ancestor, the inheritance I gave him is incomplete, and he has already taken the wrong path. Moreover, a half-step Origin Ancestor like him is not as powerful as a Quadruple Origin Ancestor late-stage powerhouse in the Holy Gate, it is not worth mentioning!" said the Dawn Origin Ancestor.

"Subordinates understood!"

The original ancestor of the ghost gate responded.

Meanwhile.

The group of Quadruple Ancestors of the Voidless Heavenly Gate were extremely angry.
